description: User master logon data: password hash, validity dates, lock status, user type.
Legacy user profile assignment table (largely superseded by role-based assignment via AGR_USERS).
User-to-profile assignment, underlying the technical profiles generated by roles.
User parameter ID (SPA/GPA) values - UX defaults only, not a security control.
Role-to-user assignment, including validity `from`/`to` dates - the authoritative source for 'who has this role' queries.
Field-level authorization values maintained within each role's authorization objects.
Core role definition table: role name, type, and description.
Composite-to-single/derived role membership mapping.
Transaction codes assigned to a role's menu.
Authorization object definitions - the master list of objects and their field structure.
Authorization object field variants and value ranges used in object definition.
Customer-namespace SU24 check indicator table per transaction-object pair.
Customer-namespace SU24 default authorization values per transaction-object pair.
SAP-delivered (non-customer) check indicator table, the baseline SU25 compares against.
SAP-delivered (non-customer) default authorization values table.
Sales document header table, commonly referenced alongside V_VBAK_* authorization object troubleshooting.
Accounting document header table, referenced alongside F_BKPF_* authorization object troubleshooting.
Material document segment table, referenced alongside M_MSEG_* authorization object troubleshooting for goods movements.
HR Organizational Assignment infotype table, central to structural authorization and P_ORGIN-based restriction.
Analysis authorization assignment data for embedded/BW-style analytics.
Transport request header and object list tables, relevant to auditing what a specific transport actually contained.
SICF service node configuration and attribute tables underlying Gateway/OData service activation.
SAP GRC Access Control risk definition table underlying the SoD rule set.
SAP GRC Access Control synchronized user-role assignment data used for risk analysis.
Security Audit Log configuration and buffered log data tables underlying SM19/SM20.
Standard text/document header table occasionally relevant to change-document and audit-trail investigation.
Change document header and position tables recording field-level before/after changes for audited business objects.
Transaction code master and text tables, useful for cross-referencing tcode metadata during role design.
Development system access control table relevant to reviewing developer authorization scope in non-production systems.
User master change stamp table, useful for auditing when a specific user record was last modified and by whom.
